policy: No direct paid API calls. Automated harness runs LM Studio only. Baselines and primary judging happen outside the harness via subscriptions or imported credit-funded outputs.

importedBaseline.purpose: Operator runs each task through a chosen sub or Azure/Vertex credit endpoint, then imports the reference output

optional.purpose: Credit-funded rubric only when explicitly enabled
Credit-funded rubric only when explicitly enabled

userJudge.purpose: Primary quality lane — review local output vs imported baseline in subscription UI or review queue
